milestoneTitle: Phase M9.2 — Pill-radius global purge: replaced 25 non-circle border-radius: var(--radius-pill) declarations with var(--radius-sm) (6px), converted the sole circular button (.faceoff-arrow) to border-radius: 50%, and deleted the --radius-pill token from :root. Also updated palette-preview.html inline pill/badge radii, bumped the design-review skill rule to past tense, and refreshed CLAUDE.md's restrained-rounding note to document the deletion + explicit circle rule. snippets.json content left untouched (user-authored prompt payload). First visible delta of the v0.7 refactor — pills across Learn/Tools/Projects/Dashboard are now squared-off to 6px.
